name: Basic Loaf Recipe for Legumes
recipeIngredient: 1 cup bread crumbs (wheat germ or ground nuts)
Seasonings to taste - garlic, onions, etc.
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients thoroughly.
2. Place the mixture in a loaf pan.
3. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit in an oven until firm, about 30 minutes.
